module.name: Space Force Command
module.description: USSF-ready progression aligned with AFDP 3-14, SDP 3-0, and the Guardian Ideal across space operations, cyber defense, intelligence fusion, leadership, and resilience pillars.

space_force_cyber_defense.name: Cyber Defense
space_force_cyber_defense.description: SDP 3-0 cyber protection teaming focused on MDT network hardening, incident response, and Zero-Trust enforcement for space mission systems.

space_force_fleet_coordination_protocols.name: Fleet Coordination Protocols
space_force_fleet_coordination_protocols.description: Synchronization drills for comms discipline, formation integrity, and adaptive routing when dozens of hulls share the same battlespace.

space_force_intelligence_and_analysis.name: Intelligence & Analysis
space_force_intelligence_and_analysis.description: AFDP 2-0 and AFDP 3-14 grounded space ISR fusion, JADC2 integration, and coalition intel-sharing drills for Delta S2/G2 leads.
focus: Intelligence Preparation of the Operational Environment

space_force_joint_space_operations.name: Joint Space Operations
space_force_joint_space_operations.description: Command-and-control integration with Air Force, Space Operations Command, and allied partners covering network-centric comms, link management, and mission rehearsal.

space_force_leadership_and_professionali.name: Leadership & Professionalism
space_force_leadership_and_professionali.description: Guardian Ideal and OTS curriculum focused on emotional intelligence, ethical command climate, and Just Culture decision framing for flight commanders.

space_force_microgravity_readiness.name: Microgravity Readiness
space_force_microgravity_readiness.description: Physiological conditioning, vestibular adaptation, and restraint/suit procedures that keep USSF crews effective during extended microgravity operations.

space_force_nebula_siege_resilience.name: Nebula Siege Resilience
space_force_nebula_siege_resilience.description: Psychophysiological hardening for long-haul sieges: radiation discipline, systems triage, and morale leadership when sensors go blind.

space_force_orbital_operations_planning.name: Orbital Operations Planning
space_force_orbital_operations_planning.description: Mission design fundamentals for real-world USSF guardians: orbital mechanics, conjunction assessment, and rapid response planning for contested space.

space_force_orbital_tactics_command.name: Orbital Tactics Command
space_force_orbital_tactics_command.description: Mission-planning doctrine for multi-vector strikes, debris-field maneuvering, and synchronized drop-pod deployment across contested orbits.

space_force_physical_and_resilience.name: Physical & Resilience
space_force_physical_and_resilience.description: USSF Physical Training Guide plus Guardian Resilience Framework combining aerobic standards with cognitive resilience drills for operational crews.

space_force_space_contingency_resilience.name: Space Contingency Resilience
space_force_space_contingency_resilience.description: Mission assurance drills for anomaly response, radiation weather events, and sustaining morale/communications during prolonged space contingencies.

space_force_space_operations.name: Space Operations
space_force_space_operations.description: AFDP 3-14 aligned mastery of orbital mechanics, payload employment, and SDA tasking for Delta crews.

space_force_zero_gravity_conditioning.name: Zero-Gravity Conditioning
space_force_zero_gravity_conditioning.description: Core stabilization, vestibular resilience, and microgravity joint-loading drills that keep operators lethal when the deck disappears.
